message:
test(fcp-host): add config revision lifecycle and stale-write guard integration test

Comprehensive integration test exercising the full config RPC surface
for a single connector through its complete lifecycle (bead 29.2.x).

fcp_host_binary_config_routes_are_live_revision_aware covers:
- Initial snapshot with no active revision (source = ManagedInventory)
- validate with no prior revision, confirming diff entries for added keys
- apply v1: creates first revision, checks created_by and change_reason
- Individual revision fetch by ID
- diff between v1 and v2 candidates
- validate with expected_active_revision_id guard
- apply v2: advances revision, verifies ordering
- rollback to v1: creates v3 pointing back, verifies linkage
- Final snapshot: 3 revisions, active = v3, payload = v1 config
- Stale-write guard: apply with obsolete expected_active_revision_id
  returns HTTP 400

Also adds spawn_with_connectors_file helper on HttpHostProcess to
launch the host binary with a pre-written connectors JSON file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
